name: Lamb Sauce
steps: In a large shallow pan, roast off ginger, garlic, and spring onion until light brown.
After roasting, add to a large pot.
Deglaze with wine, then add lamb stock and remaining ingredients.
Bring to the boil and leave on low simmering fire for 20 minutes.
Boil on low fire for 5 hours.
After boiling, strain and pass through muslin cloth.
Taste for seasoning and add if necessary, cornflour water.
